mapper.sql: AND (#{platformAdmin} = TRUE OR p.scope_type = 'PLATFORM_SHARED' OR p.tenant_id = #{tenantId})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO provider (name, code, scope_type, tenant_id, description, enabled, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{code}, #{scopeType}, #{tenantId}, #{description}, #{enabled}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.name, p.code, p.scope_type, p.tenant_id, p.description, p.enabled, p.created_at, p.updated_at FROM provider p WHERE p.id = #{id} AND p.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT p.id, p.name, p.code, p.scope_type, p.tenant_id, t.name AS tenant_name, p.description, p.enabled, p.created_at, p.updated_at FROM provider p LEFT JOIN tenant t ON t.id = p.tenant_id WHERE p.id = #{id} AND p.deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM provider WHERE code = #{code} AND deleted_at IS NULL)
mapper.update: UPDATE provider SET name=#{name}, description=#{description}, updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE provider SET enabled=#{enabled}, updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE provider SET deleted_at=NOW(), updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM provider_base_url WHERE provider_id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL)

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE p.scope_type = 'PLATFORM_SHARED') AS platformShared, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE p.scope_type = 'TENANT_PRIVATE') AS tenantPrivate, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE p.enabled = TRUE) AS enabled, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE p.enabled = FALSE) AS disabled FROM provider p WHERE p.deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT id,provider_id,protocol,original_base_url,normalized_base_url,display_name,remark,enabled,created_at,updated_at FROM provider_base_url WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT id,provider_id,protocol,original_base_url,normalized_base_url,display_name,remark,enabled,created_at,updated_at FROM provider_base_url WHERE provider_id=#{providerId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC,id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE provider_base_url SET protocol=#{protocol},original_base_url=#{originalBaseUrl},normalized_base_url=#{normalizedBaseUrl},display_name=#{displayName},remark=#{remark},updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE provider_base_url SET enabled=#{enabled},updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE provider_base_url SET deleted_at=NOW(),updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM provider_channel WHERE provider_base_url_id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL)
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM provider_base_url WHERE provider_id=#{providerId} AND protocol=#{protocol} AND normalized_base_url=#{normalizedBaseUrl} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND id <> #{excludeId})

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE enabled = TRUE) AS enabled, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE enabled = FALSE) AS disabled, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE protocol = 'OPENAI') AS openai, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE protocol = 'ANTHROPIC') AS anthropic FROM provider_base_url WHERE provider_id=#{providerId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
